markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan for upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** The Expense & Financial Management cluster grew 23% in 2 months, with Policy Enforcement content showing strong traction.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**New Metric:** Joel requested a conversion metric (beyond sessions) to prove content ROI to stakeholders. The team will explore a scalable solution, likely a data layer tag for Amplitude.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Product Updates:** The NGINX waitlist launches today, enabling content promotion. A new rewards program (Jan 2026) will offer higher rates and statement credits for Direct Bill/NGINX users.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**Holiday Prep:** Content for the next two weeks is nearly complete to ensure a smooth holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Reporting

  - [**New Looker Dashboard:** A new dashboard now cohorts experiment content by subcategory (e.g., Policy Enforcement, Receipt Chaos) to track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Expense & Financial Management Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Grew 23% over the last two months.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Policy Enforcement:** Strongest growth, with session volume comparable to older, established content.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Direct Bill:** Performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**Receipt Chaos:** High growth rate is misleading due to a low session count (81).](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Industry-Specific Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Shows a clear jump in sessions since the experiment began.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Energy & Utilities:** Rapid growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [**Construction & Infrastructure:** Steady growth; more content is being published this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**ChatGPT:** Still the top source for sessions. Recent volatility in citations/position may be due to model updates (e.g., GPT-5.1).](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Claude:** Growing rapidly.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**New Reporting Metric:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Goal:** Move beyond sessions to show content's impact on conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Method:** Analyze the correlation between viewing experiment content and converting.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provide a more robust ROI narrative for stakeholders.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Implementation Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Short-Term:** Carrie will provide a Google Sheet mapping content to subcategories for Joel's analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Long-Term:** Explore a scalable solution, likely a data layer tag in the CMS to pass content categories directly to Amplitude.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [**NGINX Waitlist:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Launches today.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Joel will confirm when content promotion can begin.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Gauge organic interest in the product.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [**Rewards Program Update (Jan 2026):**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Key Changes:** Higher reward rates and statement credits for Direct Bill/NGINX users.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Joel is clarifying if statement credits are exclusive to Direct Bill/NGINX to determine the primary benefit to highlight.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Glossary:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [A Webflow template and collection exist.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Joel will review the setup today to unblock content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### Logistics & Holiday Planning

  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [This week's content is published.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Next week's content is due today.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Post-Thanksgiving content will be delivered by Monday to get ahead.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [No meeting next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [Joel is out Nov 26–29.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

      - [Create Google Sheet mapping content to subcategories for Joel.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Add NGINX/rewards program CTA comments to articles in production.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Review Webflow glossary setup today.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Confirm when NGINX content promotion can begin.](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Clarify rewards program details (e.g., statement credit eligibility).](https://fathom.video/share/Um33UPgVVsu7QjepNa1zssMcNc2sJbK3?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
